series_metadata.series_title: Master Settlement Agreement E-Mail Address Form
series_metadata.series_description: E-mail addressess of those individuals requesting notification about updates to the list of approved brands on the Ohio Attorney Generals web site.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 5 yrs after expiration of calendar yr in which received or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year. ; Electronic: Destroy 5 yrs after expiration of calendar yr in which received or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
